description: Detects overuse of .clone(), .to_owned(), and .to_string() that may indicate unnecessary allocations. Simplified from Rust: flags all .clone()/.to_owned()/.to_string() method calls regardless of context (does not distinguish calls in loops from calls outside loops, or suppress numeric .to_string()).

flag.message: .clone()/.to_owned()/.to_string() call detected -- consider borrowing or taking ownership instead
